title: JupyterHub Server
description: Schema for a JupyterHub single-user server resource.

name.description: Server name (empty string for the default server).

ready.description: Whether the server is ready to handle requests.

url.description: URL where the server is reachable.

progress_url.description: URL for the server's spawn progress events.

last_activity.description: Last activity timestamp on the server.

user_options.description: Spawner user options used to start the server.
